app.title: Video Driven Skill — Video to Skill

home.heroSubtitle: Upload a screen recording. AI reads every step you take and generates runnable automation you can refine.
home.uploadHint: Drag a file here. MP4, MOV supported, up to 500MB
home.recordHint: Share screen or window; preview and upload when done
home.importSkillHint: Restore a skill from an exported ZIP
home.allSkillsHint: Manage, run, and export every skill
home.invalidVideo: Please upload a video file (MP4, MOV, WebM, etc.)
home.invalidZip: Please select a Skill export ZIP file

playground.sourceVideoHint: Play, seek, and capture key moments
playground.extractFramesHint: Batch extract on an interval, or capture the current frame in the player
playground.annotateHint: Use arrows, rectangles, and text to mark visual evidence
playground.frameListHint: Reorder and describe each key frame
playground.noSkillHint: Generate a Skill on the Generate tab, or pick one from the repository on the left.
playground.emptyUploadHint: Any screen recording works. AI analyzes the visuals and your workflow to produce runnable automation.

frameTimeline.empty: No frames yet. Click Auto extract or Capture current frame

frameAnnotator.pickFrame: Select a frame from the timeline to annotate

frameGrid.noFramesHint: You can use text-only mode without images, or go to Generate Skill to upload a video and extract frames.

requirement.label: User requirement
requirement.placeholder: Describe the automation task you want AI to complete…

aiProcessor.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to use AI_API_KEY from backend .env
aiProcessor.configNote: Base URL and model name are saved in this browser. API Key is kept for this session only and sent to your local backend with generate requests.

saveResource.tip: Tip · Save video first, then frames to link them
saveResource.videoSaved: Video saved. You can save frames next.

archive.title: Archived resources
archive.deleteVideoConfirm: Delete this video archive? Related frames will also be deleted.

skillList.dragHint: Drag the handle on the left to reorder
skillList.deleteConfirm:
Delete Skill "{{name}}"?
This cannot be undone.

skillEditor.knowledgeTitle: Upload images/docs as runtime context for the skill
skillEditor.partialTitle: Pick images and code range for targeted edits

skillRunner.computerWarning: Computer platform controls your desktop. Avoid sensitive actions.
skillRunner.saveDefaultsTitle: Save current config as Skill defaults
skillRunner.resetConfirm: Reset default config for this Skill?
skillRunner.killConfirm:
Stop all Midscene processes?

This will force-stop:
· All running Skill scripts
· ADB capture/command processes
· Clean temp files

knowledge.title: Knowledge · Knowledge base
knowledge.subtitle: Runtime context
knowledge.dropHint: Drag files here, or click to choose
knowledge.dropNote: Images for vision · Docs (md / txt / json) inject into agent context
knowledge.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe this knowledge (AI will read it)
knowledge.empty: No knowledge files — upload images or docs so the skill matches real scenarios

ffmpeg.title: FFmpeg required
ffmpeg.pathHint: You can also set the executable path via <mono>FFMPEG_PATH</mono> or your config file.

errors.NotSupportedError: This recording method is not supported in your browser

recorder.pickHint: In the browser dialog, choose a screen, window, or tab to share…
recorder.stopNote: Stopping share from the browser toolbar also ends recording. Content uploads only after you confirm.
recorder.emptyRecording: No valid recording. Please try again.
recorder.httpsRequired: Recording requires HTTPS or localhost and a browser that supports screen sharing.
recorder.recordingError: Error during recording. Please try again.

regenerate.title: Regenerate Skill
regenerate.subtitle: Generate a new version based on additional requirements
tips: Regeneration uses the original requirement plus your additional notes
You can use linked frames for multimodal generation when available
Without images, text-only mode is faster
After generation, compare versions and accept or discard
regenerate.noImagesTextMode: No frames available; text-only mode will be used
regenerate.placeholder:
Describe the changes you want…
For example: add error handling, improve wait logic

errorHandling.label: Add error handling
errorHandling.value: Add error handling so failures degrade gracefully.

waitLogic.label: Improve wait logic
waitLogic.value: Improve wait logic: use smart conditional waits instead of fixed delays.

logging.label: Add logging
logging.value: Add detailed logs for debugging and tracing execution.

simplify.label: Simplify code
simplify.value: Simplify this code: remove redundancy while keeping behavior.

retry.label: Add retries
retry.value: Add retries for critical steps to improve stability.

selectors.label: Improve selectors
selectors.value: Improve element descriptions for more stable targeting.

fixBugs.label: Fix potential bugs
fixBugs.value: Find and fix potential bugs and edge cases.

performance.label: Improve performance
performance.value: Optimize performance: reduce unnecessary work and waits.

partialRegenerate.title: Partial regeneration
partialRegenerate.subtitle: Targeted edits with optional screenshots and code range
tips: Text only → global code adjustment (fast text mode)
Select code lines → edit only that range
Images + code → most precise partial edits (complex cases)

text.label: Text only
text.description: Use configured text model for code edits

codeRange.hint: Drag to select lines, or click line numbers
